channel.title: How to make custom components in frontity?
channel.description: I am making a static website using wordpress and React's framework frontity! Can some body guide me how to make custom components for building of home page

item.title: How to make custom components in frontity?
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
you can create custom components for home page, you can show custom post on home page, or you can show some dynamic data with your custom API

To use Custom API there are basically three ways

  1. Install a plugin that will help you to update data as you want, and that plugin should provide the API
  2. Create your custom dashboard and create custom API
  3. Use Contentfull

Read full topic
item.source: How to make custom components in frontity?

item.title: How to make custom components in frontity?
